name: chart-insight-callout
description: Evaluate and improve chart plus insight callout slides — chart on left, so-what callout on right
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with chart evidence tightly linked to a concise right-side insight panel

prompts.text: Build a chart plus insight slide showing revenue mix shifting from services to software over four quarters, with a right-side callout summarizing why margin improved
Build a chart plus insight slide showing monthly incident volume declining from 22 to 6 over six months with a right-side explanation of the top two fixes
Build a chart plus insight slide showing churn falling from 11% to 8.5% after rollout and a callout explaining the driver
Build a chart plus insight slide showing customer satisfaction by region with a right-side insight about Europe lagging despite service recovery investment
Build a chart plus insight slide showing opex by function and a right-side callout highlighting the two cost pools to attack first
Build a chart plus insight slide showing pipeline by quarter and a right-side conclusion about Q4 concentration risk
Build a chart plus insight slide showing safety incidents by site and a right-side callout on which site drives the majority of risk
Build a chart plus insight slide showing three scenario revenue outcomes with a callout summarizing base-case planning implications
Build a chart plus insight slide showing returns rate by product family and a callout on the worst driver
Build a chart plus insight slide showing weekly active user growth and a callout on monetization implications
